source_policy: All entries must be backed by real source URLs and collection timestamps.

facts: Total nonfarm payroll employment increased by 172,000 in May 2026.
The unemployment rate was unchanged at 4.3 percent.
March and April payroll revisions were 93,000 higher combined than previously reported.
The FOMC maintained the federal funds target range at 3.5% to 3.75%.
The statement described inflation as elevated relative to the 2 percent goal.

events.event: NYSE closed for Juneteenth National Independence Day
facts: NYSE markets observe Juneteenth on Friday, June 19, 2026.
The June 2026 Employment Situation is scheduled for Thursday, July 2, 2026 at 08:30 ET.
